risk_title: Government Fund Reallocation Threatening Project Scope
risk_summary: The Ministry of Finance requested reallocation of $25 million from COMRURAL II to a disaster risk management credit, forcing project restructuring and scope reduction with limited time remaining until March 2026 closing date.
evidence_quote: on November 15, 2024 the Ministry of Finance requested the reallocation and withdrawal of US $25 million from COMRURAL II to the Honduras Second Disaster Risk Management Development Policy Credit with a Catastrophe Deferred Drop Down Option. If this reallocation of $25 M is implemented, then COMRURAL II will need to be restructured to reduce the scope of the results framework in accordance with remaining funds and remaining time for implementation.

risk_summary: Political and Governance risk rated as 'Substantial' at approval and remains 'Substantial' in current assessment, indicating persistent governance fragility affecting project implementation in Honduras.
evidence_quote: Risk Category Political and Governance [rated] Substantial [at approval] Substantial [current rating]

risk_summary: The Government of Honduras failed to meet implementation goals agreed upon in April 2024 Mid-Term Review, prompting World Bank recommendation for partial project cancellation and restructuring.
evidence_quote: It is also suggested that the Government of Honduras (GOH) partially cancels the project as the plan agreed upon in April (previous MTR mission) did not meet its goals.
